name: proshop_mern
description: MERN e-commerce fork from Brad Traversy + custom MCP/RAG/feature-flags additions for HSS AI-dev Level 1 course homework. Legacy deprecated upstream kept intentionally 'dirty' for real onboarding problems.

tech_stack.frontend: Create React App + React 16 + Redux thunk + React Router v5
additions: Python MCP server for feature flags

backend.description: Express.js REST API, Mongoose models, authentication, orders, products, uploads

frontend.description: Create React App, Redux store, screens, components, actions/reducers
frontend.tech: React 16 + Redux + React Router v5 + react-scripts 3.4

rag.description: RAG server for product search & enrichment. Node.js + Weaviate backend.

mcp.description: Feature flags MCP server. Python + stdio transport. Controls feature rollout and A/B testing.

mcp_search_docs.description: Document search MCP server. Vector search over project docs (ADR, design, API, runbooks, incidents).

feature_flags_management.description: Analysis of feature flags, UI patterns, rollout strategies.

superpowers.description: Claude Code superpowers: planning, specs, implementation plans

system_folders..claude/: Claude Code configuration: agent definitions, settings, project-specific rules
system_folders..claude/agents/: Sub-agent definitions for specialized code reviews (security-mate, architecture-mate, performance-mate)
system_folders.docs/: Living documentation: ADR, API specs, design, runbooks, incidents, pages, features
system_folders.docs/adr/: Architecture Decision Records (e.g., Mongoose 5 pinning, JWT in localStorage, Procfile legacy)
system_folders.docs/api/: REST API specifications (products, users, orders, uploads, auth)
system_folders.docs/design/: Visual design: tokens, CHANGELOG, anti-slop guards, redesign plan, accessibility, microcopy
system_folders.docs/features/: Feature specifications (catalog, cart, checkout, auth, admin, payments)
system_folders.docs/pages/: Page-level documentation (screens map: home, cart, product, profile, admin, etc.)
system_folders.docs/runbooks/: Operational guides (DB seed/reset, feature flag toggle, incident response, local setup)
system_folders.docs/incidents/: Post-mortems and incident analysis (PayPal double-charge, connection pool, JWT leak)
system_folders.uploads/: Static uploaded files (served at /uploads, persists across restarts)

root_files.AGENTS.md: Operational context for AI agents — Layer 8 docs (system prompt, project context, local runbook, known gotchas, unwritten rules, hard rules)
root_files.README.md: Project overview, what it does, tech stack, layout, setup instructions
root_files..env.example: Environment variable template (canonical source of truth for variables)
root_files.package.json: Root npm scripts (mongo:up, data:import, dev, server, client, rag:*, heroku-postbuild)
root_files.Procfile: Legacy Heroku deployment config (DO NOT TOUCH — out of scope)
root_files.FINDINGS.md: Initial audit findings from earlier module (Mongoose version analysis, tech debt)
root_files.Design.md: M4 redesign notes and visual direction

hard_rules: READ AGENTS.md FIRST at session start for operational context and known gotchas
READ project-index.json at session start for structure orientation (this file)
Preserve behavior on refactors — no test suite, write characterization tests first if changing observable output
Use Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, docs:, chore:, refactor:, scope optional)
Never commit .env — use .env.example as canonical variable list
Never touch Procfile — legacy Heroku config, out of scope
After adding new Mongoose model, update backend/seeder.js to keep fresh data:import complete
Bootstrap CSS is pinned/bundled — do not migrate to npm package unless frontend overhaul requested
Match existing code style: single quotes, no semicolons in JSX, 2-space indent, trailing commas
Backend nodemon uses --legacy-watch (fsevents fails on paths with spaces)
Frontend uses NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider on Node 17+ (react-scripts 3.4 / webpack 4)
Feature flags must use MCP get_feature_info, not direct features.json reads
Search-docs queries use MCP search_project_docs, not grep
Mongoose 5 ignores unknown operators silently — verify results in response, don't trust absence of errors
Frontend proxy targets http://127.0.0.1:5001 — keep in sync if backend port changes
NEVER read/write features.json directly — use feature-flags MCP tools
NEVER introduce Redux Toolkit or second state manager without explicit user request (v2 did that already)

ai_routing.feature_flag_queries: Use feature-flags MCP get_feature_info tool (not direct file reads)
ai_routing.feature_flag_changes: Use feature-flags MCP set_feature_state / adjust_traffic_rollout tools
ai_routing.docs_search: Use search-docs MCP search_project_docs (not grep + read)
ai_routing.structure_questions: This project-index.json file (do not walk the filesystem tree)
ai_routing.code_questions: AGENTS.md Section 'High-Signal Paths' + backend/controllers/, backend/routes/, frontend/src/

notes.upstream_status: bradtraversy/proshop_mern is officially deprecated in favor of proshop-v2 (Redux Toolkit). We keep the original intentionally 'old' for realistic onboarding problems.
notes.course_context: This is a course fork used as a baseline for AI-dev course homework (modules M2-M7). Reference solutions for students live in feature branches.
notes.mcp_servers: Two MCP servers configured in .mcp.json: (1) feature-flags (Python), (2) search-docs (Node.js). Both are project-local implementations.
notes.frontend_proxy_note: frontend/package.json proxy is set to http://127.0.0.1:5006 in file but AGENTS.md says 5001 — use 5001 (correct for backend)
notes.env_note: Root .env is source of truth. PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID=sb is sandbox safe to commit in .env.example. Never commit actual .env file.
notes.known_issues: Mongoose 5 is 4 majors behind (see FINDINGS.md). React 16 + react-scripts 3.4 require NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider on Node 17+. Backend nodemon uses --legacy-watch due to path spaces.
